title: trisetum obtusiflorum
intro: Trisetum obtusiflorum, also known as obtuse-flowered trisetum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving respiratory issues, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Trisetum obtusiflorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and decoction, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
